text: Storage Storage Sense can automatically free up space by getting rid of files you don't need, like temporary files and content in your recycle bin. @D off Configure Storage Sense or run it now Local Disk (C:) - 930 GB | 301GB used 629 GB free This is how your storage is used and how you can free up space. - @ Temporary files 7.03 MB Choose which temporary files to remove Show more categories
